articles.title: High vacancy rates may hide a housing shortage in northern New England, report finds
articles.description:
is used to specify article abstract. You can only provide plain text in this element. --> A new LendingTree report finds that many vacant homes in tourism-heavy New England states are seasonal properties, leaving fewer options for year-round residents.
